case_title: NOTKIN MELINDA VS NG RAYMOND MR. et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $811.88 FILED BY NOTKIN MELINDA AS TO DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR. SAN FRANCISCO CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOTKIN MELINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR. SAN FRANCISCO CLEANERS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR. HEARING SET FOR AUG-03-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-20-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-03-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM AUG-03-1992 TO AUG-26-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR. SAN FRANCISCO CLEANERS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT NG RAYMOND MR.
